businessName: A and C Private Pool Resort
industry: Private pool / vacation home rental / day venue

contact.name: A and C Private Pool Resort team
contact.address: Abuab Road II, San Mateo, Rizal, Philippines

system.label: Booking & calendar admin
system.painHero: Day swim, pavilion, and room rentals stack up on Messenger — see which dates are taken and confirm private-pool bookings from one calendar.

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive website only (amenities, gallery, about, FAQ, contact). Admin preview is a sample; production booking system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: No public email or phone on Facebook About — outreach via Messenger. Ask before any email send if an address appears later.

sources.pageTitle: A and C Private Pool Resort | San Mateo
sources.address: Abuab Road II, San Mateo, Philippines
sources.notes: Scraped logged-out via Cursor browser (About + Photos). No public phone/email on FB. Pool/pavilion/room rates from PH.vacations listing (day/night/22hr entrance, A/C rooms, pavilion, videoke). Assets: cover/hero 2048×1536, gallery pool shots up to 1024×1536 via signed fbcdn + Facebook referer.
